name: Governed-History Backup
description: The 3-2-1 durability leg for the per-node chains: WAL-safe db snapshot + fleet chain mirror doubled at the NAS, every byte read-back verified, the backup history itself a re-verifiable chained ledger on the share. Perk-agnostic lifecycle (ready -> prepared -> verified -> executed); the perk supplies the concrete, contract-bound how. LOOK OUT FOR backup.json + the share-side backup-ledger.json; LOGS TO CHECK: the per-tool JSON line + the executor run-ledger.

prepared.description: inputs validated - required vars present, runtime + store reachable

verified.description: the plan is contract-bound - the perk's tool sequence resolves and its contract (I/O + checks) is in place

executed.description: the perk's tool sequence ran ONLY via executor.py - each step recorded to the run-ledger AS it runs

g_governed.description: ran ONLY through executor.py; contract enforced

a_prepare.description: validator confirms required vars + writable record_store + reachable runtime

a_verify.description: confirm the perk's sequence + contracts are bound

a_execute.description: run the perk's tool sequence via executor.py - recording each step to the run-ledger as it runs
